files_changed.description: Issue section parser: is_structured_issue(), parse_structured_issue(), extract_issue_slug(), load_issue_body(), and artifact generators for requirements/pre_clarifications/post_clarifications/reference_context
Add try_structured_issue_skip() that detects structured issues via issue slug, parses sections, auto-generates group artifacts, and advances phase to PostClarificationsCreated

summary: Structured issue format support: issue_parser.rs parses ## Problem/Requirements/Scope sections from .score/issues/ files; init_change.rs detects structured issues via issue:{slug} in description, auto-generates group artifacts, and skips to PostClarificationsCreated phase. Unstructured issues fall back to normal flow.
